attributes.action: Residential parking in dunravan street aberkenfig Bridgend.
attributes.additional_details: Force our local council Bridgend bcbc to put residential parking to the traffic is control safety
attributes.background: Help the community to park safely in the street as we live next to a mosque, and due to their prayers our street is so congested that we feel that this in poses on our health , due to the emergency service cannot access the community. Also the amount of car are effecting our health due to pollution

rejection.details:
This is also a local issue, which the e-petitions system does not deal with. It's also potentially a general issue devolved to the Welsh Government.  You may wish to start a petition on the Senedd petitions webpage:

https://petitions.senedd.wales/
